subject: [CSE 101A] Homework 3 due date updated
snippet: Homework 3 moved to Tue Apr 14 at 11:59 PM PT after weekend VPN outage.
body_text:
Hello CSE 101A students,

Several teams reported that the campus VPN outage on Sunday delayed final pushes to the Homework 3 repository. After checking commit timestamps and the Canvas incident report, we are moving only Homework 3: Graph Search from Sunday, April 12 at 11:59 PM to Tuesday, April 14 at 11:59 PM Pacific. No rubric items or autograder tests changed.

Please submit on Gradescope as usual and include your latest commit hash in the text box. If you already submitted, you may resubmit until the new cutoff; only the most recent upload will be graded.

Thank you for the detailed reports,
CSE 101A Staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: moving only Homework 3: Graph Search ... to Tuesday, April 14 at 11:59 PM Pacific

notes: Single homework due-date push with explicit old/new date.

subject: [CSE 110] Project Milestone 1 closing time change
snippet: Milestone 1 still due Mar 5, but closes at 10:00 PM PT instead of 8:00 PM.
body_text:
Hi everyone,

We found a mismatch between the time shown on the assignment PDF and the time configured in Gradescope for Project Milestone 1. To match the syllabus language used in lecture, the due date remains Thursday, March 5, but the closing time is now 10:00 PM PT (previously 8:00 PM PT).

The assignment contents, partner policy, and late penalty rules are unchanged. Please refresh the Gradescope page before final upload, since some browsers cache the old deadline card.

Best,
CSE 110 instructional team

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: due date remains Thursday, March 5, but the closing time is now 10:00 PM PT

notes: Due-time only adjustment on same date.

subject: MATH 20C: Midterm 1 rescheduled to Wed 2/18
snippet: Midterm 1 moved to Wednesday 2/18 at 7:30 PM in Peterson 108.
body_text:
Dear MATH 20C class,

Because the registrar moved two evening exams into the same block, we had to rebook a room and shift Midterm 1. Midterm 1 will now be on Wednesday, February 18 at 7:30 PM in Peterson 108. The previous Monday slot is canceled.

Practice set deadlines stay the same, and the formula sheet policy is unchanged. If your approved accommodation letter references the old date, please forward this message to the OSD coordinator so the booking can be updated.

Thanks,
Prof. Liang

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: Midterm 1 will now be on Wednesday, February 18 at 7:30 PM

notes: Exam reschedule with explicit cancelation of old slot.

subject: [DSC 40B] Quiz 5 time changed
snippet: Quiz 5 is still on Apr 9, but starts at 3:30 PM PT instead of 4:00 PM.
body_text:
Hi all,

Quick scheduling correction for Quiz 5: the date remains Thursday, April 9, but the start time has changed to 3:30 PM PT. We are making this change so students in the overflow room can begin simultaneously with the main section.

Canvas will publish the updated availability window this afternoon. Please arrive five minutes early so we can complete identity checks before launch.

Regards,
DSC 40B staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: date remains Thursday, April 9, but the start time has changed to 3:30 PM PT

notes: Quiz same-day time shift.

subject: CHEM 6A Lab Report 2 extension
snippet: Lab Report 2 deadline extended to Feb 22, 11:59 PM PT due to instrument downtime.
body_text:
Hello CHEM 6A students,

The spectrometer cluster in York Hall was unavailable for most of the weekend, and several sections could not finish calibration runs. To keep grading fair, Lab Report 2 is extended by 48 hours and is now due Sunday, February 22 at 11:59 PM PT.

Please keep the same report template and submission link. TAs will hold an extra troubleshooting hour on Friday for anyone rerunning plots.

Sincerely,
CHEM 6A teaching team

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: Lab Report 2 ... is now due Sunday, February 22 at 11:59 PM PT

notes: Classic extension message tied to lab outage.

subject: [PHYS 2A] Problem Set 4 deadline moved earlier
snippet: Problem Set 4 now due Tue Feb 10 at 5:00 PM PT (was Thu Feb 12).
body_text:
Students enrolled in PHYS 2A,

Please note an administrative correction for Problem Set 4. Because the department scheduled a campus-wide network maintenance window on Thursday evening, we are moving the Problem Set 4 deadline earlier to Tuesday, February 10 at 5:00 PM PT. The prior Thursday deadline should be ignored.

If this change conflicts with an approved accommodation arrangement, email your section instructor by Monday noon so we can document an exception.

Physics advising office

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: moving the Problem Set 4 deadline earlier to Tuesday, February 10 at 5:00 PM PT

notes: Deadline moved earlier with explicit former date reference.

subject: ECON 100A Reflection 1 submission window adjusted
snippet: Reflection 1 still opens Friday; the close time is now Apr 3 at 6:00 PM PT.
body_text:
Hi ECON 100A,

We received requests to avoid overlap with the Friday discussion attendance check. Reflection 1 will still open Friday morning, but the submission window now closes Friday, April 3 at 6:00 PM PT instead of midnight.

Please plan to submit before section starts. The prompt and grading criteria are unchanged, and the same Canvas assignment link remains active.

Thank you,
ECON 100A staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: submission window now closes Friday, April 3 at 6:00 PM PT instead of midnight

notes: Submission-window close moved earlier same day.

subject: [COGS 118A] Take-home final due time update
snippet: Take-home final now due Mar 19 at 12:00 PM PT.
body_text:
Dear COGS 118A students,

This is a scheduling correction for the take-home final upload. The final exam submission deadline has been moved to Thursday, March 19 at 12:00 PM PT to align with the registrar's exam-window policy for asynchronous sections.

The release time and allowed duration stay the same. Please verify that your PDF export includes all pages before uploading, since regrade requests based on missing pages cannot be accepted after the deadline.

Best,
COGS 118A instructional staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: final exam submission deadline has been moved to Thursday, March 19 at 12:00 PM PT

subject: ECE 35 HW7 due-date correction
snippet: HW7 is due May 1 at 11:59 PM PT; old due date in handout was a typo.
body_text:
Hi ECE 35,

We confirmed a typo in the PDF handout for Homework 7. The correct due date is Friday, May 1 at 11:59 PM PT. The previously listed date in the footer was copied from last year and should be ignored.

No problem statements changed, and office hours this week remain focused on Question 4 and Question 6. Please continue submitting through the existing Gradescope assignment.

- ECE 35 staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: correct due date is Friday, May 1 at 11:59 PM PT

notes: Due-date correction caused by stale handout footer.

subject: [BILD 3] Project 1 submission time changed
snippet: Project 1 design memo now due Apr 20 at 12:00 PM PT.
body_text:
Hello BILD 3 students,

To reduce conflict with the campus poster session setup, we are changing the due time for Project 1 (Design Memo). The due date remains Monday, April 20, and the new closing time is 12:00 PM PT.

Please do not wait until the last minute because the upload queue is usually heavy around noon. If your group has multiple files, zip them before upload so the timestamp reflects a single submission attempt.

Thanks,
BILD 3 course team

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: due date remains Monday, April 20, and the new closing time is 12:00 PM PT

notes: Project due-time shift to midday.

subject: MATH 18 Problem Set 2 extended
snippet: Problem Set 2 extended to Oct 6, 11:00 PM PT.
body_text:
Dear MATH 18 students,

Given the power outage in Geisel and Center Hall yesterday, many of you lost access to the computing lab during your planned work window. Problem Set 2 is therefore extended to Tuesday, October 6 at 11:00 PM PT.

Please submit to the same Gradescope assignment. We will post a short walkthrough for the matrix-rank question during Friday discussion so nobody is blocked by the extension.

Regards,
MATH 18 instructional staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: Problem Set 2 is therefore extended to Tuesday, October 6 at 11:00 PM PT

notes: Extension in FA quarter with non-midnight due time.

subject: [CSE 120] Quiz 2 moved earlier

body_text:

Reminder that Quiz 2 has been moved earlier to avoid overlap with the campus career fair traffic period. Quiz 2 will now run on Wednesday, April 15 at 9:00 AM PT. The prior 2:00 PM slot is no longer valid.

Please check your browser lockdown extension tonight; late technical setup will not qualify for an additional extension unless there is a documented campus outage.

CSE 120 course staff

SE 101A staff

subject: CHEM 40B Lab Report 5 submission time update

body_text:
CHEM 40B class,

Please upload raw spectra as a second file if your plots were regenerated after section. The grading rubric remains exactly the same as announced in week 4.

- CHEM 40B teaching team

subject: [MAE 8] Homework 9 window shifted
snippet: Homework 9 closes Mar 1 at 9:00 PM PT; opening time unchanged.
body_text:
Hi MAE 8 students,

To avoid collision with the machine shop safety training block, we are shifting the Homework 9 submission window. The assignment still opens on Friday morning, but it now closes Sunday, March 1 at 9:00 PM PT rather than 11:59 PM.

Please plan your CAD export earlier in the evening, since large uploads tend to fail near deadline spikes. If you encounter repeated upload errors, email both the screenshot and timestamp to staff immediately.

MAE 8 staff

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: now closes Sunday, March 1 at 9:00 PM PT rather than 11:59 PM

notes: Window-shift with earlier closing hour.

PSYC 60 staff

CSE undergraduate advising

BENG 100 staff

ECON 120B instructional team

subject: ECE 17 Problem Set 10 due-date update
snippet: Problem Set 10 now due Mar 8 at 11:59 PM PT.
body_text:
Hi ECE 17,

We corrected a mismatch between the LMS calendar and the assignment handout. Problem Set 10 is due Sunday, March 8 at 11:59 PM PT, and this timestamp is now reflected on both Canvas and Gradescope.

No other deadlines are changed by this message. If you were planning around the earlier incorrect date, please use office hours this week so we can help you prioritize the remaining questions.

ECE 17 teaching team

expected_semantic_event_draft.evidence: Problem Set 10 is due Sunday, March 8 at 11:59 PM PT

subject: [CSE 120] Remaining quiz schedule shift
snippet: All remaining quizzes move from Friday to Monday, effective immediately.
body_text:
Hello CSE 120 students,

To avoid repeated conflicts with department colloquium Fridays, we are applying one rule to the rest of the quarter: every remaining quiz that was scheduled for Friday will now be due on Monday instead. This applies only to future quizzes that have not yet closed.

Quiz content and numbering stay the same; only the due weekday changes. We will refresh the Canvas calendar feed tonight.

CSE 120 staff

expected_directive.evidence: every remaining quiz ... scheduled for Friday will now be due on Monday

notes: Bulk weekday move for all future quizzes.

subject: MATH 20C Homework 4-7 unified due day
snippet: Homework 4 through Homework 7 are now all due on Sunday.
body_text:
MATH 20C students,

After reviewing section pacing, we are standardizing the mid-quarter homework cadence. Homework 4, Homework 5, Homework 6, and Homework 7 will all use a Sunday due day instead of Friday.

This is a bulk schedule adjustment covering that ordinal range only; Homework 1-3 keep their original deadlines, and later items may be announced separately. Please recheck your planner if you had recurring Friday reminders.

MATH 20C staff

expected_directive.evidence: Homework 4 ... Homework 7 will all use a Sunday due day instead of Friday

notes: Ordinal-range directive with weekday mutation.

subject: CHEM 6A lab report cadence change (future reports)
snippet: All future lab reports move from Tuesday due dates to Thursday due dates.
body_text:
CHEM 6A class,

Given the recurring instrument reset delay on Wednesdays, all future lab reports are being extended by 48 hours in practice. Any upcoming lab report that currently shows a Tuesday due date should now be treated as due on Thursday of the same week.

This policy applies to future lab reports only and does not reopen reports that already closed. The grading rubric and file format requirements are unchanged.

- CHEM 6A teaching team

expected_directive.evidence: all future lab reports ... currently shows a Tuesday due date should now be treated as due on Thursday

notes: Future-only bulk extension encoded as weekday shift.

subject: [DSC 80] Project checkpoint consolidation
snippet: Project checkpoints 2-4 now share one due date: 2026-05-03.
body_text:
Hi DSC 80 teams,

To simplify cross-team demo logistics, we are consolidating the due dates for Project Checkpoints 2 through 4. Checkpoints 2, 3, and 4 will all be set to Sunday, May 3, 2026.

Please note this is a schedule normalization for that checkpoint range only. Checkpoint 1 and the final deliverable keep their original deadlines unless separately announced.

DSC 80 course staff

expected_directive.evidence: Checkpoints 2, 3, and 4 will all be set to Sunday, May 3, 2026

notes: Ordinal-range directive with explicit fixed date mutation.

subject: ECON 120A remaining reflections moved to Wednesday
snippet: All future reflections that were due Monday are now due Wednesday.
body_text:
Hello ECON 120A,

Starting this week, all remaining reflection assignments will shift to a Wednesday due day. If a reflection currently appears with a Monday deadline, treat that as outdated and use Wednesday going forward.

This change applies only to future reflections and is meant to better match discussion section timing. Existing submissions remain final and will not be reopened.

ECON 120A instructional team

expected_directive.evidence: all remaining reflection assignments will shift to a Wednesday due day

notes: All-matching future-only reflection weekday change.

subject: [ECE 45] Quiz 6/7/8 one-time date alignment
snippet: Quiz 6, Quiz 7, and Quiz 8 are all moved to 2026-04-22.
body_text:
ECE 45 students,

Because the engineering open house occupies our normal test rooms during weeks 6-8, we are applying a one-time alignment for three quizzes. Quiz 6, Quiz 7, and Quiz 8 will all use Wednesday, April 22, 2026 as the due date in the LMS.

Please do not infer changes for quizzes outside this list. Staff will provide section-level timing details in a separate room-assignment post.

ECE advising office

expected_directive.evidence: Quiz 6, Quiz 7, and Quiz 8 will all use Wednesday, April 22, 2026 as the due date

notes: Ordinal-list directive targeting three quiz ordinals.

subject: [PHYS 2B] Future problem sets moved off Sunday
snippet: All future problem sets currently due Sunday are now due Tuesday.
body_text:
Hi PHYS 2B,

We are shifting the recurring problem-set deadline to reduce Sunday-night system load. For all future problem sets, any item that is currently due on Sunday will now be due on Tuesday instead.

This is a forward-looking rule and does not modify deadlines that have already passed. Please update recurring reminders in your calendar app so they match the new weekday.

PHYS 2B staff

expected_directive.evidence: all future problem sets ... currently due on Sunday will now be due on Tuesday

notes: Future-only all-matching problem-set weekday mutation.

subject: BILD 1 Homework 1-3 due-date unification
snippet: Homework 1, 2, and 3 are all set to a shared due date: 2026-04-10.
body_text:
Hello BILD 1,

To keep early-quarter pacing consistent across sections, we are unifying the first three homework deadlines. Homework 1 through Homework 3 will all have the same due date: April 10, 2026.

Only this ordinal range is affected by the announcement. Later homework items keep their existing schedule unless another notice is posted.

BILD 1 instructional staff

expected_directive.evidence: Homework 1 through Homework 3 will all have the same due date: April 10, 2026
